name: dooh-ooh-advertising-research
title: DOOH & OOH Advertising Research Dataset
description: 189 machine-readable claims documenting evidence-based risks of Out-of-Home and Digital Out-of-Home advertising infrastructure. Covers regulatory bans, public health harm, environmental impact, privacy law (EU AI Act, GDPR), traffic safety, market concentration, governance, culture, and equity. Bilingual DE/EN. Sources are independent unless explicitly flagged as source-critique records.

resources.name: claims-index
resources.title: All Claims — Master Index
resources.description: Machine-readable index of all 189 claims with metadata (id, title, category, impact_score, year, source_type, file path).

fields.name: file
fields.description: Relative path to full claim markdown

resources.name: bilingual-embedded-dataset
resources.title: Embedded Bilingual Dataset (DE+EN)
resources.description: Full dataset with German and English content for all 189 claims, embedded as JavaScript constant for direct browser use.

resources.name: rag-chunks
resources.title: Retrieval-Ready JSONL Chunks
resources.description: One JSONL record per claim with consolidated text and metadata for embedding or vector-search pipelines.

resources.name: advertising-quotes
resources.title: Cultural and Philosophical Advertising Quotes
resources.description: Short quote fragments about advertising, publicity, spectacle, and consumer persuasion, linked to empirical claim IDs as interpretive context.

regulation.description: Bans, court rulings, EU directives, greenwashing law

health.description: Food marketing, gambling, alcohol, HFSS bans

psychology.description: Cognitive impact, body image, behavioral influence

urban.description: Visual pollution, public space, property values

privacy.description: GDPR, EU AI Act, biometric surveillance

alternatives.description: Ad-free city models, civic space funding
